transport_boundary.runtime_boundary: test-local RemoteRuntime adapter using production asupersync TCP surfaces and src/remote.rs protocol messages
transport_boundary.no_tokio_policy: The proof uses asupersync::net plus futures-lite test blocking only; it does not introduce tokio, hyper, tonic, async-std, smol, or a core runtime executor dependency.

scenario_matrix.required_observable: serde round-trip preserves remote_task_id, idempotency_key, and command tag
RemoteTransport send/try_recv crosses TCP loopback and preserves Lamport metadata
spawn_remote delivers accepted spawn result over TCP loopback
close sends CancelRequest and drains terminal cancelled result
pending handle sends cancel before ack and drains terminal result
rejected spawn returns SpawnRejected and clears pending origin state
lease renewal reply is observed before terminal result
lost renewal maps to LeaseExpired and clears runtime state
EOF before reply unregisters pending task
malformed reply returns SerializationError and unregisters pending task
delayed ack still preserves ordered result delivery
duplicate idempotency key returns cached result without a second execution
Cx without RemoteCap fails closed with NoCapability
RemoteCap without runtime uses explicit deterministic fallback

validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_remote_transport_lifecycle cargo test -p asupersync --test remote_transport_lifecycle_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_remote_transport_clippy cargo clippy -p asupersync --test remote_transport_lifecycle_contract --features test-internals -- -D warnings
acceptance_gates: all required log fields are emitted for every scenario
pending and tracked runtime state counts return to zero after terminal outcomes or spawn failures
failure injection covers send failure, receive EOF, delayed ack, malformed envelope, and lost renewal
duplicate idempotency replay does not execute the remote computation twice
capability denial and no-runtime fallback remain explicit
residual_risks: The production-backed proof is loopback-scoped; remote deployment discovery, TLS, authentication, and WAN retry policy remain adapter-specific surfaces.
The proof maps src/remote.rs protocol messages through a test-local JSON frame format; a future stable production wire format still needs its own compatibility contract.
